title: Blue Cod
description: Bringing back the classic blue fish from the good old days!
body:
This pack brings back the og blue fish textures, replacing the vanilla cod. Please feel free to use it anyway you wish, no credit necessary. Enjoy! :D ![before & after](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06fae7dffc0bc54e7ecb7e46dc001bf66140cf5f.png) ![vanilla cod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/731552b9af14b815ae3b8d564b7d519a105cf174.png) ![school o' blue cod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a271edc0b20bf9f9da598a56945ae8c05a95e0d7.png) # 1.21.5+ Spawn Egg ![eggs_bf_af](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67c1940198afce7957a701738917f2edb613c717.png) # 1.20-1.21.4 Legacy Spawn Egg ![legacy_eggs_bf_af](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cef7560a2f5c1f2b843d560a66d177671bdd63e.png) # Name change ![cod_rename](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fa8118013d92ee4305049d572445bb63e999692.png) ![compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97352231e0e2306befae96f621e4dd086c8e1601.png) ## Built-in [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) compatibility 1.20-1.21.3
![diamond](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e67e630fae8a5b3de089ccf161cec305399481f.png) :3
